best_testcase_text: test case id: tc-databaseaccess-001 title: access database module: database access source pages: 2, 3, 5 preconditions: user is authenticated. test data: valid user data. test steps: 1. main initiates checkauthenticated with the current user. 2. checkauthenticated requests data from the data manager. 3. data manager returns success to checkauthenticated. 4. checkauthenticated passes success to main. 5. main sends data to the data manager. 6. data manager processes the data and returns success. 7. main signals success to the local user. expected result: data is accessed successfully from the database.
